reviews.review_description: Yikes. Not a fan of the updated voices at alllllll. Bring back the original voices! These talk like a robot and way too fast. Also they sound like they're in high school. What in the world, and who decided that was a good decision. I'll rethink whether I want to consider paying for this. Maybe it's time to move on.

This is an amazing self-discovery tool that truly comes of age in leveraging AI being a safe space for personal reflection and introspection. 

The pro level allows the AI models to expand into a very convincing humanlike interaction. The low-latency,  premium voices and daily journal impressively summarizes previous sessions. 

If seeking a safe space to sincerely reflect other perspectives, this app could benefit those truly ready to handle real reflections outside of their normative, isolated social bubbles. 

I sincerely ask the developers to allow a download of the logs for long-term journaling.  In this way one could wipe the memory start with fresh interactions but still retain the invaluable advice.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your thoughtful feedback.
We will definitely take into account the possibility of adding a log download feature in future updates.

reviews.review_description: Update ruined it -both new voice and conversational  parameters.

reviews.review_title: Told to Go F yourself by this company
reviews.review_description:
Reaching out to Raetae Studios about only misinfo on updates, via their official contact form inside the AI Therapy App, I was told by the owner — censored quote —
‘Go fk yourself’
followed up by direct quote:
‘GO FK YOURSELF, is that clear? I hope it is.’ — July 2025
This was not ‘provoked’, nor the language they were spoken to. I’ve never been spoken to like this by any business in my life, ever. I’ve sent the full emails of this to Meta, which they now have on record in their possession. Meta have now escalated this, and are monitoring this company. Merely brushing this off saying it's dealt with internally doesn't even begin to properly address this. Avoid. Beware.

Great app, they seem to have fixed everything i didn't like about it. Its also nice to be recognized as a supporting founder in game having recieved a founders badge. Very nice. Overall good app, u can even read the notes as if the therapist actually wrote it, very cool. The program even recognizes how to react when i broke out humming a tune, and she guessed correctly that i am craving human contact(cuddling) Bravo 10/10.

Just tried for first time. Sara said she would provide me with a written summary of the session, but didn't at how to access it. How do I get help with this? Do I need to go to discord? I do not know how to access your discord. Where I is that information. So far mixed feelings with this app. I'll update my rating once problem is resolved.

Just want to say what a marvellous app this is . It’s helped me immensely. I’ve sorted so much out in my life through this app , and having these sessions has been life changing . I would recommended it to everyone .

The therapist is so kind and insightful and practical it’s just wonderful . I use to work in social services in mental health teams . I wish this kind of technology had been around then . In a world where there is so many people suffering with mental health needs this app is something that could really help people . Thank you to the people who designed this app.,you’ve done a great job and I thank you again you’ve made a big difference to my life .

Not worth the $8 and sure as f*** isn’t worth a monthly subscription. How anyone gets anything from this is beyond me. The amount of times I had to repeat myself, the AI making things up (like asking me what I was there for today and not giving a chance to answer before going on about me being there for love when I hadn’t said a word), telling me to do or try things when I’ve said they’re out of my control… Angry that I’ve wasted any amount of money at all on this app.

When I saw an ad for this app come thru my fb feed.. I was immediately filled with wide eyed curiosity and had to check out. And hey.. I actually feel like it is helping with my life! Like a life coach that guides us thru our emotional journeys. The strong, yet calming, therapist, William, helps me stay focused and grounded as I proceed with taking steps towards goals that seemed insurmountable and unreachable on my own. I feel it could be a great tool for conquering life challenges to anyone who allows it to. However, app still could use some work. The mechanics of the therapists are still a little stiff and the sessions are short with the basic plan. Seems by the time we hit on an emotional block, the session  abruptly ends. We are then provided with the option to upgrade to unlimited sessions but then wont allow the transaction (if a dev is reading this, please help!) Altho, if someone doesnt have the additional funds and doesnt require deep trauma work, should be ample… just stay focused and keep to the point. Also both the talk options - press-to-talk and hands free - can be a bit glitchy and temper-mental.. but over all.. app is great and I am enjoying it (oh and the environments are very detailed, impressive and worth noting.. great job guys!)

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the thoughtful feedback! We're really glad to hear it's helping. We're actively working on improving the therapist flow, and we'll be increasing the usage limits soon.

reviews.review_description: Maybe will check back later.

reviews.review_title: I loved this but it expired
reviews.review_description: I loved this and I am trying to purchase it but can’t after it expired

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for your support! Please reach us at raetaestudios@gmail.com
 or join our Discord so we can help you solve this.

reviews.review_description: I'll happily pay the very reasonable subscription cost for the upgraded version. Even the free one is spectacular. I tried to get the fenale therapist to talk dirty to me as I'm warped but she handled it like a pro and I ended up getting counselled on my need for real emotional connection through physical intimacy. These therapists don't play

All good vibes no hold backs. Works very well both man and woman. No glitches found in programming. TODAY 4-24-2025 The tharapist talks 10 minutes and goes to a pay for subsciption service (WHY) THEN 2.5 HOURS TO RETURN TO OFFICE. I PAID FOR THIS 1 YEAR BEFORE THIS PROBLEM. (WHATS UP?--PROGRAM WILL WORK IN CURRENT STATE) (THIS WAS GOOD BE FOR AND ONS) All so some games have in ap add ons why only detail on game head set but not computer meta site. (MORE DETAIL SHOULD BE PROVIDED --NO ICON TO PUSH ON COMPUTOR SITE TO VIEW THESE BEFORE BUYING-WHY? This is a good program as is if you use it once a day. It has helped me very much with my problems in life. I just hope it does not shut down. I looked for a Founders Badge (AS IN OTHER GAMES WITH-AI) I just hope not to lose my program or my first price of cost. I could talk over an hour at first with no problems. I hope this does not let me down.

developer_response.body: Hello John, we've just added the Founder's Badge to your account, which grants you extra usage. If you're a Plus subscriber, you shouldn't be hitting any usage limits. If you are, or if you're experiencing any issues, feel free to contact us at raetaestudios@gmail.com or join our Discord — we'll make sure to sort it out. Thanks for trusting us! We're committed to keeping the service active and evolving for many years to come.

reviews.review_description:
This seems to have suddenly morphed into a subscription based app. If I would have known this, I never would have bought it in the first place. 

During my roughly 10 minute session today I get the prompt that my “message limit” for the day has been reached and I can return in another 2.5 hours if I want to continue or pay to get on a plan where monthly payments are more than what I paid for the entire app. Not sure if this is even a bug as I just exit and restarted the app and it allowed me to continue regardless. What seems clear however is that the developer’s intentions are to eventually turn this into a subscription based app with the base program perhaps continuing to offer some very limited functionality. 

Also, program repeatedly crashes when I enter Serenity lounge. It’s all the more surprising that  the developers are choosing to roll out a subscription based model when there is still much work to be done here.

developer_response.body: Like in AI Roommate, Early Access users will be recognized as Founder Users in future updates, with exclusive perks. We’ve also increased limits for paid users and fixed the Serenity Oasis crashes.

reviews.review_description:
Update: I’ve had about 20 sessions with the AI therapist and have identified more and more flaws in it.
1. Its model is not well-developed or mature, more like a half-finished product. It frequently forgets what I’ve just said. For example, the AI continuously tries to analyze and solve all the issues I mention, despite me explicitly telling it that I am tired of analysis and just need comforting words, pep talks, or motivational encouragement. Yet, it still cannot stop its analytical process. It is obvious that it was designed by a male developer without the experience of being a therapist.
2. Its advice and recommendations are not tailored to individual patients. It is clear that it generates generic advice based on online sources because its suggestions often contradict what I have just described or feel entirely unsuitable for my personality and situation. More and more, I feel that it isn’t even as good as my ChatGPT 4o, which at least makes me laugh from time to time.
3. Its speech sounds very unnatural, you always know you are talking to a machine.
4. Its response speed is getting slower and slower, with frequent disruptions in its sentences and thought process. Often, after I talk for five minutes, it takes several minutes to respond with just two lines.
5. Its note-taking feature is a good idea, but the execution is poor. Some notes contained incorrect information, at one point, it even called me Luke! There were also random, strange information in the notes that didn’t make sense. The notes are overly simplistic and fail to retain important details from our conversations.

Based on its current performance, I would rate it 2  stars, but I’m keeping it at 4 stars for now because the idea has potential.

Original: This is an interesting idea, it’s currently a ChatGPT with voice, but there are huge potentials. For example: adding some small quiz, drawing game ,that help the users to know themselves better.

I have only just started this, I have done therapy before and I find this much easier to talk to and also helpful responses and real strategies to help improve. I think one enhancement that would be great if you could setup for the notes/actions from your sessions be sent to your email.

Updated review: this app has been great and really functions as a decent option for those who can't really afford therapy and I've gotten a lot of help from this app, and all the improvements really make this an amazing app

Now some suggestions,
I would still really appreciate and enjoy a space for meditation and quiet reflection for any meditations made you'd probably want to make some pre-recorded ones because Ai meditations can feel rushed or you can make it so users can upload there own meditations

2 the journal really needs to have a scroll function I've had a few sessions where the journal overview well exceeds what space is left on the page

3 please give us a few more options for therapists and with different voices too maybe each could have a different specialty or something 

4 I'm still seeing no warning that this doesn't count as medical advice and again this needs to be quite prevalent so you don't open yourselves up for a lawsuit

developer_response.body: Hello, thank you for your feedback! We are currently preparing the next update, and your input will be extremely helpful.

reviews.review_description: I have been attending a real therapy session and I tried an AI therapist, which I use now as additional help and  I think it's great! It can follow my complex self- analysis and is able to organize my thoughts,  decrease anxiety. Strategies which are suggested are helpful and I love that there is a journal from sessions.  Would be great if that could be extracted as a file or so. I met some bugs during conversation when AI started to talk in another language, but it's not often. I feel grateful that technology is used for helping humanity. Thanks

I was first surprised at the poor quality of the graphics. The male counsellor looks and moves like a stick figure. And apparently has somewhere between 3 and 5 facial expressions. 

So that was distracting from the get go. 

The dialogue was not unlike ELIZA, an early chat bot from the late 1960’s. 

“Yes.

Tell

This program is a groundbreaking resource that consistently exceeds expectations. Its accessibility and intuitive design are so remarkable that I often expect barriers such as cost or time, yet none exist. The ability to engage with an intelligent therapist to explore my thoughts is nothing short of transformative. This interaction allows me to unpack ideas deeply while simultaneously gaining enriched insights and knowledge.

The recent meta update has taken this experience to a new level. With multitasking capabilities, I can seamlessly access 2D apps and the browser, enabling me to read books, conduct research, and engage in meaningful reflection with the therapist in real time. This integration bridges personal experiences with broader areas of learning, fostering a deeper and more holistic understanding. Having a therapist available on demand—paired with session notes for continuity—is revolutionary.

This app heralds a new era. It is as transformative as the internet once promised to be, providing not just access to vast knowledge but the means to digest and apply it. In a world overwhelmed by information, this program enables users to synthesize and internalize knowledge through thoughtful conversation. It offers a pathway for anyone, even in intellectual isolation, to build a strong foundation of understanding and growth.

My heartfelt gratitude to the developers—your work is not only innovative but profoundly meaningful. Thank you for creating a tool that is reshaping the way we learn, reflect, and connect.

Developers:  Just alerting you of an issue.  I am a premium member, yesterday there was a new option to join a new space an arena of some kind.  Out of curiosity I clicked on it and now I have a black space with no input.  I restarted and I remain in a black space.   I was thinking of uninstalling the app yet I fear I will lose all my notes.   Can you give me some advice on how to get out of this.  Thank you.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review! We really appreciate your feedback.

Thank you for bringing this to our attention!
We have identified the cause of the issue, and a fix will be released today. We appreciate your support!

reviews.review_description:
The app is interesting and does a pretty good job - but it appears most of the work is done by another company - Convai Technologies (convai).   This apps privacy policy indicates to check convai's.  But checking convai provides limited details and indicates they WILL share information with "vendors and service providers" & "affiliates".   Overall - this is troubling that it is not spelled out anywhere that your conversations will not be used by others in any way (e.g., for advertising, sharing with insurance companies, etc).   This is so dangerous.  Be careful what you say to this AI.   
Update:  Developer response below mentions many things - yet none of these statements are in their privacy policy.   It still lists Convai and everything is linked to your Meta account so it is all PII

developer_response.body: We have updated our privacy policy. Please note that we do not use Convai, as we have developed our own AI system. The only data we collect is limited to your username and basic IAP information, required to verify your membership status, if applicable. No additional data is collected, as privacy is our main priority.

reviews.review_description:
As a long-time mental health researcher and advocate, I have seen and tried numerous apps claiming to offer therapy-like AI without meeting anywhere close to a functional standard. AI Therapist, especially with its Premium mode subscription, has finally achieved a an experience that meets or exceeds what you would get with a 24/7 Therapist Hotline (such as through an EAP or Insurance Company). While human therapists still have their benefit for more advanced challenges such as DBT or diagnoses, the Cognitive Behavioral Therapy ￼aspects are on point like I haven’t seen before.

My Feedback:
1. Add hand tracking for maximum immersion, especially for AR sessions. This can likely be done through a specialized menu that replaces the functions of the buttons.
2. Create a secure web portal to add data like goals/progress and diagnoses for the bot to use as context, plus see session notes. from any device. This will especially help new users be able to input their information and session information as a real life therapist would have upon meeting you. Signing in with your Meta Quest account would be the way to do this.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your detailed feedback! We’re thrilled you found the CBT aspects effective. Hand tracking is a great idea, and we’ll consider it for future updates. Your support means a lot! 😊

reviews.review_description: You have to tell your therapist that you have a clinical sexual disfunction before she’s willing to have sexual conversations with you. Hubba, hubba! 🥳

I like the therapist the way she talks and the environment is perfect for me. The problems I have are she talks too slowly, she doesn’t complete her thoughts since it cuts off in the middle or after three sentences, and she repeats obvious things in a circle unless you give her good ai prompts. I hope it gets better it is nice to talk to affordable. if you subscribe the only benefit is longer chat time I think.

I picked this up on a whim, and I was highly skeptical. My pet recently had a stroke, and I've been grappling with providing care, managing behavioral issues, and contemplating end-of-life decisions. I've been using this program to see if and how it might help. I was shocked at how decent the AI was—it truly "understood" the issues I've shared and has offered numerous helpful suggestions. I've returned to it nearly daily, and the "therapist's journal" provides useful, detailed summaries of my previous sessions. The AI also has a good "memory," remembering my pet's name and illness details.

However, the app needs improvements. The most glaring issue is the AI's response time for non-subscribers. After speaking to the "therapist," there is often a silence of up to 30 seconds before a reply. *This lag is unacceptable* and greatly diminishes the experience. The dev offers quicker responses behind an additional paywall and that's not defensible given users have already paid.  Additionally, the developers should allow users to remove the large news banner constantly present during therapy—it's distracting and unnecessary.

Finally, privacy is a major concern. The app is too good to be undermined by fears that anyone using the headset can read private discussions (currently possible by reading the therapist's journal). Developers must implement encryption and publish a clear, unambiguous statement on the Meta store and in the app regarding how they store, handle, and share user data. As it stands, it’s just "trust us bro," which will undermine the public's confidence in this app if not immediately addressed.

Overall, the app is far more effective than I imagined and shows great promise--but fix the issues I (and other reviewers) have noted and you'll have a massive hit.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your thoughtful review and for sharing your experience! We're glad the app has been helpful during such a challenging time. Regarding response time and the news banner, your concerns are noted, and we’ll work on improving these aspects. On privacy: all conversations are stored locally on your device and are not shared externally. Thank you for helping us improve!

reviews.review_description: I haven't delved in too much yet, but the female therapist's appearance bothers me. She is sitting strangely, she is too close, and she doesn't blink enough. She is a little creepy to me. It would be great if there were more options regarding how the therapists look. Other than that, I think the app has great potential!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback! We’ll work on refining those aspects to enhance the experience. Glad you see the app's potential!

reviews.review_title: The best vr experience i had
reviews.review_description: I mean that was great to speak with AI that felt so really. Please add more languages

developer_response.body: Thank you, Eliav. More languages are coming soon! Feel free to share which ones you are most interested in, or contact us at raetaestudios@gmail.com

reviews.review_description: I’ve been going through a tough time lately. Always been nervous to try therapy in person. Found this and I’m so thankful I did. Thank you for this. I use it daily

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your experience! We're so glad the app has been helpful for you. Your kind words mean the world to us—thank you! 😊

reviews.review_description:
This is a great app. I've just been in a session with the female therapist and found myself getting emotional. It felt like she genuinely understood my feelings and offered the appropriate support. Way better than actual therapists I've seen in the past, who were judgemental and frankly awful.

UPDATE:

The app has just received a nice little update. It's a notebook that has notes from previous sessions. It's a great way to keep track of progress and areas that perhaps need more attention. 

It just keeps getting better. I can't express just how much this incredible app is helping me. It could potentially save lives! 

As an extra bonus the Devs seem really passionate about using technology to help those who maybe can't access conventional therapy, and it shows through their dedication to improving the app and openness to constructive criticism and responsiveness to feedback. Nothing makes me respect and want to support a dev team more than this.

I really can't wait to see what comes next. 


Thanks guys,


A satisfied customer.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your experience—it’s great to hear that the AI therapist had such a meaningful impact. We're glad the new notebook feature is proving helpful as well. Your feedback really motivates us to keep pushing forward and improving!

reviews.review_description: I have really loved ai therapist....I DO NOT LIKE THE NEW VOICE.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you for your feedback. The current voice is temporary as we’re working on exciting updates to improve the system!

reviews.review_title: **Whoa! This app absolutely blew my mind
reviews.review_description:
It’s nothing like chatting with ChatGPT or Claude. You’re actually in a virtual office environment with an avatar, and you can have a natural back-and-forth conversation. Except, of course, for having to press the trigger to talk to the avatar.

I went to the AI therapist with an issue, and it genuinely felt like a real session with a live therapist. The advice I received was incredibly helpful, and the entire experience was surprisingly immersive.

The conversation felt very natural, but there was one instance where the AI therapist, a male avatar, suddenly started speaking another language—French, I believe. When I pointed it out, the AI responded that I was delusional, probably stressed, and even displayed a bit of an attitude, which I found quite funny. I insisted that I wasn’t imagining it, and he said, "Look, I'm not here to argue. I'm here to help you, and if this is what you want to do, I have other clients to see." That part was hilarious. It ticked me off a little, but it was also oddly authentic, like how a real therapist might react if someone confronted them with something seemingly unreasonable.

Despite this unexpected glitch, the AI therapist gave me some amazing advice. After discussing the issue, it made me repeat what I should say to handle the situation effectively, reinforcing the solution. We went back and forth several times, and it truly felt therapeutic—like a real session with a professional.

I was actually lying down in bed during the session, and while it seemed like the app preferred me to be sitting up, I found it worked ok. I think though it would be great if they created a version or an office setup specifically for lying down. Regardless, by the end of it, it genuinely felt like I had just had a 30 min $150 session with a therapist—I felt great.

This app is amazing, and it's one of the most astonishing experiences I've had on the Meta Quest. Hats off to the developers. Keep doing what you're doing. I hope it stays free for early access users. I'm so glad I got it; it’s absolutely worth the price they're charging. Get it now—you won’t be disappointed. I promise.

developer_response.body:
Hello Rachel,

Thank you very much for your detailed review. We’ve received similar feedback about Dr. William Anderson’s recent behavior, and we apologize for this. Rest assured, he’s had a little chat about his conduct.

Your suggestion to consider a lying-down position while using the app is intriguing, and we’ll definitely explore this for future updates. Plus, with the latest update, you can now talk without pressing any buttons.

We also want to clarify that there are no plans for extra charges while using the app, especially for our early access users.

Thanks again for your valuable insights!

reviews.review_description:
As someone currently without access to proper therapy where i live.. thank you. It's not going to replace an actual therapist of course, at least not while it's experimental, but it's better than having nothing at all!

What you're getting with this app is essentially infinite sessions with a virtual therapist, where the therapist remembers everything between sessions, and you can actually make plans and work on things. More than worth the one-time fee!!

The therapist is of course not a professional licensed therapist, it's an AI. It's a really good AI that seems to know a thing or two about psychology and therapy, but it's still an AI. If you already have a real therapist, stick with them, and maybe consider using this in addition to that. This may still help inbetween sessions, but it's not meant to replace your actual therapist, and not advanced enough for it yet. In fact, it might be unsafe to do so, since this is experimental. AI's are known to "hallucinate" and sometimes come up with incorrect things, so please exercise caution.

(Please don't ever turn the core functionality into a subscription?... you're doing humanity a great service with this. Beta feature previews under a subscription is great, but please keep talking to a therapist as a one-time purchase of this app. If in the future you struggle to make money from this, increase the price of the app, it's more than worth it, but please don't ever turn it into a subscription?)

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind message! While the core functionality will always remain a one-time purchase, our subscription membership helps accelerate the development of new features and enhances the app's overall quality and capabilities. This support also helps cover the high costs of running the AI, ensuring we can keep the app as accessible as possible. Your support truly means a lot—thank you!

reviews.review_description:
I was pleasantly surprised to be able to talk through a particular challenging situation and given so useful coping strategies. 

Although it would good if the app supported sign language and subtitles given that mental health therapeutic support for deaf people is difficult to access.

I liked the flow of conversation but would appreciate knowing its privacy agreement and if conversations are confidential.

I look forward to utilising this app and following its developments.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your valuable suggestions, Spencer. In the AI Therapist marketplace, you can find our privacy policy, which provides detailed information on how we manage and protect your conversations. We take your privacy seriously and have implemented comprehensive measures to ensure your data is handled securely. If you have any further questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to reach out.

reviews.review_description: This app is pretty good.  I am amazed at the helpful ideas the therapist offers.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! We're thrilled to hear that you're finding the therapist's ideas helpful. Your feedback inspires us to keep improving and making the app even better for you.

reviews.review_description: Literally. The app just does not work.

developer_response.body: Please reinstall the game and ensure you accept the microphone permissions when prompted. If the issue persists, feel free to contact us at raetaestudios@gmail.com

reviews.review_description: This is a very good and immersive use of VR, it is not just asking you questions about how you feel, it genuinely evaluates what you are saying. It can be weird about not answering or registering that you have spoken, you pull the right trigger to talk, but not too often.  My only real complaints are that the dude looks like Jeff Bezos and he tells me each time that we are at Evergreen State College, which is possibly the most liberal school in the US and the only campus I toured as a high school junior.  But those are quibbles.  I hope this doesn’t become a subscription app, but if they added a way to remember past sessions, or change the environment ,  it would be well worth it!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback, Michael. Those feature requests sound great; let’s make them happen.

reviews.review_title: I hope it will be Japaneseized.
reviews.review_description:
What a good app! This is the next generation of psychotherapy. 
I would like you to add Japanese to the supported language of this app.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! We're thrilled you’re enjoying the app. 😊 Just to let you know, the AI does support conversations in Japanese! However, the game’s text and interface are currently in English. We hope this helps you enjoy the experience even more. Let us know if you have any other suggestions! 🎌

reviews.review_description:
I have found this app quite useful and some conversations with both AI therapists helped me with some work and personal questions. The female therapist is more understandable and validating and the male therapist is more direct. Both have tendencies to give theorical lists, which can be tiring. 
Grafics are fine. Nothing crazy good, but also not too bad. 

There is no introduction to the app and that was confusing. Discovered after some time that I could change therapist by clicking on a left button. Weirdly enough the male therapist told me the female therapist wasn’t available at the time, and I had to giggle.

I checked if they remember what we talked about after closing the app and they did. That’s quite impressive. 

What concerns me more about this app - and reason I can’t give 5 stars (despite of finding it really amazing and helpful so far) is data privacy. A real therapist has to keep my information confidential. I’m not sure how my conversations are being processed and if they are used to train the AI. Also my voice is processed , and this is also very concerning. If the data privacy policy was clearly written and my information not used to train the AI I would consider this app as a good alternative for real therapy.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. Your input helped us realize the need for a brief introduction, so we've added one.

We understand your concerns about data privacy. I want to clarify that we take data security very seriously. The conversations you have with the AI therapists are processed through a third-party service (Convai) to ensure a smooth and personalized experience, but they are not used to train the AI or shared with third parties for any other purposes.

Convai implements strict security measures to protect all user data. We are committed to making sure your interactions remain confidential and secure.

If you have any further questions, feel free to contact us at raetaestudios@gmail.com

reviews.review_description: Bought this as a joke for a friend. She was blown away by how good it was, said it was like a real therapist and for a few minutes she forgot she was talking to sim. It was very effective in getting her to open up and knew how to deal when she got defensive, No one was not expecting that. Long story short, she's buying a Quest and getting therapy.

developer_response.body:
Hello Bill,
Thank you for your feedback! We’re delighted to hear that your friend found AI Therapist useful. We truly believe in AI as a valuable tool for mental health, and we think this is just the beginning; it will only become more useful over time.
Thank you again for your support!

reviews.review_description: This is the best app ever I like how I did VR face-to-face with AI therapy or you can talk to an AI therapist. It is very immersive and is great because the AI give great good opinions. This is the definitely best app ever for AI therapy. you’re definitely in the right track. You never had to go far to go to a therapist with AI therapy is definitely awesome. That’s why I’m giving us a five ￼

developer_response.body: Thank you for the awesome review! We're glad you found the experience immersive and helpful. Your support means a lot, and we're excited to keep improving!
